title: Vanilla SMP
description: VanillaSMP modpack includes optimization, visuality content with minecraft vanilla style. Main focus to save vanilla style but enhance and balance every aspect.
body: [Quickstart](https://vanillasmp.gitbook.io/vanillasmp-docs/documentation/getting-started/quickstart) | [About Modpack](https://vanillasmp.gitbook.io/vanillasmp-docs/modpack) | [Documentation](https://vanillasmp.gitbook.io/vanillasmp-docs/documentation) | [Changelog](https://vanillasmp.gitbook.io/vanillasmp-docs/changelog) | [Discord](https://discord.gg/WRaKBR2vSH) * 🏆 **1000+ Advancements** — with rewards and trophies * ⚡ **Better Performance** — runs great on just 2 GB RAM * 🔊 **Better Sounds** — GUI sounds, sound physics, expanded Minecraft music * 🩺 **Better HUD** — armor durability HUD, status effects HUD * 🎨 **Better Visuals** — animations, textures, particles, atmosphere & animated mobs * 🖼️ **Better GUI** — legendary tooltips, icons, custom font, chat animations, dark mode * 🧭 **Better Gameplay** — Litematica, freecam, click-through frames, shulker tooltips, waypoint location bar * 🧱 **Better Textures** — connected textures, refreshed vanilla textures * 🎭 **Better Customization** — skin changer, cape changer * ⚙️ **Better Settings** — fog control, entity render distance control ### 🎮 Gameplay * **Advancements** — 1000+ Advancements with Rewards and Trophies * **Events** — Special plugin that brings live server-wide events * **Fishing** — Makes fishing more dynamic: the catches depend on where you fish, weather, and your luck level. It turns every trip to the water into a mini-game instead of a flat random roll. * **Items** — Adds special gear, tools, and consumables with unique effects. * **Worlds** — Your gateway to fresh, random regenerated worlds in Minecraft! * **Enchantments** — Additional Enchantments with unique custom mechanics, effects and magic * **Teams** — Players can build a real squad: organize chat, unlock shared perks, and make teamwork feel connected * **Quests** - Everyone competes on the same quest board. Be first. Grab the reward * **Playtime Rewards** - Earn emeralds just by playing! ### ⚡ Performance * **Sodium** — Complete rendering engine replacement. Massive FPS gains with zero gameplay impact. * **Sodium Extra** — Extra toggles for Sodium: animations, weather, particles — full control. * **Lithium** — Optimizes game logic (mob AI, physics, chunks) without changing behavior. * **EntityCulling** — Skips rendering entities behind walls and out of view. Big FPS boost in crowded areas. * **MoreCulling** — Extends culling to blocks and foliage for even fewer wasted draw calls. ### 🎨 Visuals #### Shaders & Textures * **Iris Shaders** — Shader loader for Fabric, fully compatible with Sodium. Supports OptiFine shader format. * **Continuity** — Connected textures for glass, leaves and more — just like OptiFine. * **SimpleFog** — Fine-tune or disable fog; add atmospheric haze at any distance. #### Animations & Models * **Not Enough Animations** — New first-person and third-person player animations: off-hand holding, swimming, ladder climbing. * **ETF — Entity Texture Features** — Random and variant mob textures. Required by FreshAnimations. * **EMF — Entity Model Features** — Custom entity models via resource packs. Required by FreshAnimations. * **SkinLayers 3D** — Renders the outer skin layer as true 3D geometry — hats, jackets, beards all pop out. #### Particles & Atmosphere * **Visuality** — Adds ambient particles: torch sparks, bubbles, magical effects on mobs and items. * **InventoryParticles** — Emits particles from inventory slots based on equipped items. * **CoolRain** — Improved rain with splash animations on surfaces. *** ### 🔊 Sound * **Sound Physics Remastered** — Realistic sound physics: cave echo, muffled audio behind walls, reverb in large spaces. * **Sounds** — Extended sound pack with new sounds for actions, mobs and environment. *** ### 🖥️ UI & HUD #### Menus & Loading * **FancyMenu** — Fully customize the main menu: backgrounds, buttons, animations, music. * **Drippy Loading Screen** — Stylish loading screen with progress bar, custom background and logo. * **ModMenu** — Browse installed mods in settings with direct access to each mod's config. #### Advancements * **BetterAdvancements** — Redesigned advancements screen: smooth navigation, stats, search. * **Advancements+** — Extra achievement hints and progress information. #### Tooltips & Inventory * **ShulkerBox Tooltip** — Hover over a shulker box to preview its contents without opening. * **Dynamic Tooltips** — Animated item tooltips with smooth fade-in appearance. * **Enchantment Descriptions** — Shows a description of each enchantment directly in the item tooltip. * **TierTagger** — Colored rarity/tier badge on items in inventory. * **ClickThrough+** — Click through signs and item frames to interact with blocks behind them. #### HUD * **Simple Armor HUD** — Compact on-screen display showing armor durability at a glance. * **EffectTimerPlus** — Remaining duration overlay for every active status effect. * **Effectual** — Visual improvements to status effect icons and their layout. * **Stendhal** — Better formatting and display of long text in books and chat. *** ### 🧭 Utilities & Gameplay #### Building & Navigation * **Litematica** — Schematic tool: load a structure and build it block by block with a ghost overlay. * **VanillaWaypoints** — Waypoints integrated into the vanilla interface — no bloated UI. * **LocatorLodestones** — Compass can point to lodestones directly from your inventory. * **Legacy Freecam** — Detached free camera for screenshots and scouting without moving your character. #### Exploration * **BookshelfInspector** — Hover over a bookshelf to see the books stored inside. * **Spyglass Astronomy** — Point your spyglass at the night sky to observe constellations and planets. * **Legacies & Legends** — RPG elements: artifacts, legendary items and unique abilities hidden in the world. *** ### 💬 Social & Personalization * **Simple Voice Chat** — In-game voice chat with positional audio, walkie-talkie mode and channels. * **CraftPresence** — Discord Rich Presence showing exactly what you're doing and where in Minecraft. * **SkinShuffle** — Switch skins without restarting; manage multiple skin profiles. * **BetterCapes** — Custom capes: upload your own or pick from a community collection. * **Chat Animation** — Messages in chat appear with a smooth slide-in animation. *** ### 🎨 Resource Packs #### Mob Animations * **FreshAnimations v1.10.4** — Complete overhaul of every mob's animations: fluid movement, expressive faces, lifelike behavior. The flagship pack. * **FA+Details** — Addon to FreshAnimations adding high-detail textures and fine surface details. * **Eating Animation** — Unique eating animations in the player's hand for every food item. * **AL's Enderman Revamped** — Enderman rebuilt for FA: new model, animations and menacing expression. * **AL's Piglins Revamped** — Piglins and Brutes with detailed new FA-style animations. * **AL's Skeletons Revamped** — All skeleton variants with improved models and Fresh-style movement. * **AL's Zombies Revamped** — Zombies with reworked motion and detailing tuned for FreshAnimations. * **AL's Scorpions & Crabs** — Spiders reimagined as scorpions and crabs with unique animations. * **Drodi's Blazes FA** — Blazes with reworked models and smooth Fresh-compatible animations. * **Drodi's Illagers x FA** — Pillagers, Evokers and Vindicators with detailed FA animations. #### World Enhancement * **Simple Grass Flowers** — Sprinkles small flowers and plants into grass for a lush, lived-in look. * **Fancy Crops** — Crops (wheat, carrot, potato) rendered as full, voluminous plants as they grow. * **Connected Bricks** — Seamless brick textures that flow across block boundaries. * **Connected Paths** — Cobblestone and stone slab paths connect without hard edges. * **Connected Rocks** — Stone and cobblestone form monolithic rock surfaces on large walls. * **Vanilla Experience+** — Large-scale vanilla texture refresh that stays true to Minecraft's original style. #### UI & HUD * **Default Dark Mode** — Dark theme for the entire Minecraft UI: inventory, menus, books. * **MandalasGUI Dark Mode** — Ornate dark-themed GUI with mandala patterns for an elegant look. * **Numbered Hotbar** — Slot numbers on the hotbar for instant orientation. * **Icons** — Improved icons for status effects, tools and other HUD elements. * **TGK Enchants** — Enchantments displayed as clean symbolic icons on items. * **qrafty's Capitalized Font** — All-caps style font for clean, readable in-game text. * **Chat+** — Enhanced chat formatting with icons, dividers and better layout. * **Wynn Ranks** — WynnCraft-style rank prefixes and badges in chat. * **BACAP Language Pack** — Localization pack for Better Advancements Completion achievements. *** ### 🌟 Shaders * **Complementary Reimagined r5.7.1** — The gold standard for vanilla-style shaders. Soft lighting, volumetric clouds, realistic shadows — beautiful without breaking Minecraft's aesthetic. [Join the Discord Server](https://discord.gg/WRaKBR2vSH)
